sglang.title: Reduce mamba prefill allocation overhead
sglang.author: YazhiGao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Goal
Reduce CPU overhead in prefill scheduling by batching mamba state slot allocation. The scheduler opens one grouped allocation window for the waiting queue, and normal mamba_pool.alloc(1) calls draw from that preallocated batch instead of repeatedly doing per-request allocation bookkeeping.
This

sglang.title: [mem_cache][2/N] refactor: move SWATokenToKVPoolAllocator to allocator/swa.py
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Second PR of the issue #25371 (parent: #24335) allocator-promotion series. Builds on PR #26675 (allocator subpackage skeleton).
SWATokenToKVPoolAllocator currently lives in swa_memory_pool.py alongside the SWAKVPool device pool. This PR moves only the allocator into the allocator/ package

This PR adds a fallback to the CK (gemm_a8w8_blockscale) kernel for non-tuned shapes, which is significantly faster than the generic Triton path for MoE models with m

Motivation
On MI355/HIP, Compressor.forward() calls linear_bf16_fp32() which does:
return tgemm.mm(x, y, otype=x.dtype).float()
The .float() triggers a separate bfloat16tofloat32_copy_kernel_cuda elementwise kernel (~4.2 us each). Thi

sglang.title: ci: cache HF hub for base-a-test-cpu to avoid Hub 429 flakes
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
base-a-test-cpu runs on ephemeral GitHub-hosted runners with no HF cache, so every run cold-downloads tokenizers/models from the Hub. When the Hub returns 429 Too Many Requests, tests fail spuriously after exhausting retries — unrelated to the PR under test.
Example: https://github.com/sgl-p

sglang.title: Add quiet mode for busy mem check (level 1: buffer + dump on leak)
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The busy mem check (SGLANG_ENABLE_STRICT_MEM_CHECK_DURING_BUSY) runs every event-loop iteration. Previously any verbose level (> 1) logged [Mem Check (BUSY)] on every iteration, which is very noisy.
Split the verbosity into two levels:

level 1: buffer the per-iteration messages in a ring buffer (la

sglang.title: [HiSparse  PD & PP]Fix HiSparse compatibility with PP decode
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the non-PP decode path, after KV transfer finishes, each request is passed through hisparse_coordinator.admit_request_direct(req) before entering waiting_queue. This initializes the HiSparse device buffer metadata required by decode-time swap-in.
The PP decode path uses a separate rele

sglang.title: Plug mamba_extra_buffer ping-pong slot leaks
sglang.author: sshleifer
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Under mamba_scheduler_strategy=extra_buffer + enable_overlap_schedule, every request claims 3 mamba_pool slots (1 mamba_pool_idx + 2 ping-pong buffer slots). The release paths consistently free the main idx and the pool-side ping-pong slot, but leave dangling references to the ping-pong buff

sglang.title: Support optional kwargs in AITER fused_moe runner
sglang.author: zx3xyy

PR description:
Motivation
Some AITER fused_moe integrations need to pass backend-specific options directly to the installed AITER kernel while keeping the generic SGLang MoE runner interface unchanged. This PR adds a small extension point for those optional kwargs and enables no_combine forwarding

sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When prefetching from storage in HiMambaRadixCache, the host KV allocation could fail under memory pressure and the whole prefetch was dropped.
Mirror the HiRadixCache behavior: on allocation failure, shrink the prefetch length to the page-aligned available host size and retry, so a parti

The dev images bundle SGLang + a matching transformers p

Root cause: the aiter greedy_sample kernel - used for greedy decoding when SGLANG_U

NotImplementedError: No compressed-tensors compatible scheme was found.

The error fires while building the first quantize

sglang.title: Enable runtime busy memory check for speculation topk>1
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What
The busy-time KV-pool invariant check (SchedulerInvariantChecker.self_check_during_busy) was disabled whenever speculative_eagle_topk > 1. That early-return predated the uncached accounting in the checker: the check used to be available + evictable + protected == total, which cannot account for

sglang.title: Use level-1 (quiet) busy memory check in chunked-prefill and streaming tests
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Switch these two fixtures from SGLANG_ENABLE_STRICT_MEM_CHECK_DURING_BUSY=2 (verbose: logs the pool accounting every decode step) to =1 (quiet: buffers recent messages and dumps them only on a leak). Same per-step leak assertion, far less CI log spam.


CI States
Latest PR Test (Base): ❌ Run #269791

The implementation extends the existing GraniteSpeech model:

vllm.title: [Bugfix] MiniCPM-V-4.6 video inference crash: placeholder count mismatches visual embedding count
vllm.author: tc-mb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Sending a video request to openbmb/MiniCPM-V-4_6 causes EngineDeadError — the engine core crashes because the number of <|video_pad|> placeholder tokens does not match the number of visual embeddings produced by the vision tower. Image inference works correctly; only video triggers this.
Roo

vllm.title: [Core] Freeze garbage collector in workers after model initialization
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Drastically reduce P99 ITL in some cases (especially WideEP) by freezing the garbage collector at the end of compile_and_warm_up_model

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Reject non-positive values for ParallelConfig int knobs
vllm.author: jwzheng96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds Pydantic lower-bound constraints to the parallelism-size knobs in
ParallelConfig so that obviously invalid values (zero, negative) fail
fast at construction time instead of producing nonsensical world_size
or surfacing as opaque errors later in torch.distributed.

vllm.title: [ROCm][perf] Use workspace manager for sparse indexer allocations
vllm.author: tuukkjs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Replace dynamic per-call allocations in the ROCm sparse attention indexer with workspace manager allocations.
The sparse attention indexer uses temporary buffers in both prefill and decode: k_fp8 / k_scale in prefill and decode logits buffers in rocm_fp8_paged_mqa_logits. These buffers are r
